reviews.name: accounts/112233/locations/445566/reviews/rev1
reviews.comment: Best croissants in Bangalore! Super buttery and flaky, tastes exactly like Parisian bakeries. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: accounts/112233/locations/445566/reviews/rev2
reviews.comment: Loved the chocolate pastry, but it gets crowded during the afternoon. The staff is polite.

reviews.name: accounts/112233/locations/445566/reviews/rev3
reviews.comment: Nice ambient space but slightly expensive. Coffee was good.
